ddls:
CREATE TABLE "enzymes" (
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enzyme */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the enzyme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the enzyme's function */,
  "ec_number" TEXT /* Enzyme Commission number */,
  "uniprot_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier from the UniProt database */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene encoding the enzyme */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism from which the enzyme is derived */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the enzyme */,
  "structure_pdb_id" TEXT /* Protein Data Bank (PDB) identifier for the enzyme's 3D structure */,
  "activity_ph" REAL /* Optimal pH for enzyme activity */,
  "activity_temperature" REAL /* Optimal temperature for enzyme activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enzyme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reactions" (
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction */,
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enzyme catalyzing the reaction */,
  "reaction_equation" TEXT /* The equation representing the biochemical reaction */,
  "stoichiometry" TEXT /* Stoichiometric coefficients of the reaction */,
  "reaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the biochemical reaction */,
  "delta_g" REAL /* Gibbs free energy change (ΔG) for the reaction */,
  "enzyme_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the enzyme in the reaction */,
  "substrate_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the substrate in the reaction */,
  "product_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the product in the reaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reactions_enzyme_id FOREIGN KEY ("enzyme_id") REFERENCES enzymes ("enzyme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reaction_bounds" (
  "bounds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the bounds */,
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reaction these bounds correspond to */,
  "min_flux" REAL /* Minimum flux for the reaction */,
  "max_flux" REAL /* Maximum flux for the reaction */,
  "reaction_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the bounds are measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bounds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reaction_bounds_reaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("reaction_id") REFERENCES reactions ("reaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathways" (
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biochemical pathway */,
  "pathway_name" TEXT /* Name of the pathway */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pathway */,
  "pathway_type" TEXT /* Type of the biochemical pathway */,
  "pathway_organism" TEXT /* Organism in which the pathway is found */,
  "pathway_complexity" INTEGER /* Complexity score of the pathway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enzyme_pathway" (
  "ep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the enzyme-pathway association */,
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enzyme */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pathway */,
  "role_in_pathway" TEXT /* Role of the enzyme in the pathway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enzyme_pathway_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enzyme_pathway_enzyme_id FOREIGN KEY ("enzyme_id") REFERENCES enzymes ("enzyme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subsystem" (
  "subsystem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the subsystem */,
  "subsystem_name" TEXT /* Name of the subsystem */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subsystem */,
  "subsystem_type" TEXT /* Type of the subsystem */,
  "subsystem_organism" TEXT /* Organism in which the subsystem is found */,
  "subsystem_function" TEXT /* Function of the subsystem */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subsystem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enzyme_subsystem" (
  "es_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the enzyme-subsystem association */,
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enzyme */,
  "subsystem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subsystem */,
  "role_in_subsystem" TEXT /* Role of the enzyme in the subsystem */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("es_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enzyme_subsystem_enzyme_id FOREIGN KEY ("enzyme_id") REFERENCES enzymes ("enzyme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enzyme_subsystem_subsystem_id FOREIGN KEY ("subsystem_id") REFERENCES subsystem ("subsystem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the reference */,
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enzyme */,
  "reference_text" TEXT /* Text of the reference */,
  "reference_type" TEXT /* Type of the reference */,
  "reference_year" INTEGER /* Year of the reference */,
  "reference_authors" TEXT /* Authors of the reference */,
  "reference_doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_references_enzyme_id FOREIGN KEY ("enzyme_id") REFERENCES enzymes ("enzyme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enzyme_kinetics" (
  "kinetics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the kinetic data */,
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enzyme */,
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reaction */,
  "km_value" REAL /* Michaelis constant (Km) value */,
  "vmax_value" REAL /* Maximum reaction rate (Vmax) value */,
  "kcat_value" REAL /* Turnover number (kcat) value */,
  "inhibitor" TEXT /* Inhibitor of the enzyme, if any */,
  "activator" TEXT /* Activator of the enzyme, if any */,
  "inhibition_constant" REAL /* Inhibition constant (Ki) value */,
  "activation_constant" REAL /* Activation constant (Ka) value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kinetics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enzyme_kinetics_reaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("reaction_id") REFERENCES reactions ("reaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enzyme_kinetics_enzyme_id FOREIGN KEY ("enzyme_id") REFERENCES enzymes ("enzyme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enzyme (if role is specific to an enzyme) */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pathway (if role is specific to a pathway) */,
  "subsystem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subsystem (if role is specific to a subsystem) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_enzyme_id FOREIGN KEY ("enzyme_id") REFERENCES enzymes ("enzyme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_subsystem_id FOREIGN KEY ("subsystem_id") REFERENCES subsystem ("subsystem_id")
)
